_comment: Copy this to config.json and fill in your values. Alternatively use environment variables — see docker-compose.yml.

tariffs._comment: Add a new entry whenever unit rates change. Uses the most recent entry effective on or before each reading date. All rates ex VAT.

standing_charges._comment: Daily network standing charge ex VAT. Add entries as rates change.

pso_levy._comment: Government PSO levy as monthly figure ex VAT. Changes each October.

night_hours._comment: Night rate window in Irish clock time. DST is handled automatically.
